identity.variant: Apptronik Apollo original platform (2023 launch announcement)
identity.notes: Apollo 2023公式発表と公式Solutions/Industryページを確認。Apollo 2の現行仕様は流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: commercial general-purpose humanoid robot designed to work alongside people in warehouses and manufacturing plants
modular design supports bipedal walking, wheeled torso and stationary configurations
initial focus on case/tote handling in logistics and manufacturing; human-centered industrial work

mobility.rawValue: true bipedal walking humanoid, wheeled torso or stationary configuration
mobility.condition: modular mobility options; no single deployed configuration selected
mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式発表が二足・車輪・据置の構成を明示するためgeneric値を単一移動方式に固定しない。

heightCm.condition: official launch value converted from imperial units
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式発表の身長5ft8inをcmへ換算。

weightKg.condition: official launch value converted from imperial units
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 公式発表の重量160lbをkgへ換算。

speedMps.rawValue: walking capability is described but no numeric speed found
speedMps.condition: official launch and solution pages checked
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 歩行能力は確認できるが、数値速度は公開されていない。

dof.rawValue: degrees of freedom not published on reviewed Apollo official pages
dof.condition: do not use third-party or Apollo 2 values

payloadKg.rawValue: ability to lift 55 pounds is retained in loadRatings; schema payload is not filled
payloadKg.condition: manufacturer wording and no rated/maximum definition

runtimeMin.rawValue: each swappable battery provides four-hour runtime
runtimeMin.condition: per swappable battery; not continuous runtime without swapping
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 公式発表の1本あたり4時間。電池交換による連続運用と混同していない。

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: battery capacity in Wh/Ah not published
batteryCapacityWh.condition: do not infer from four-hour runtime

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: charging time not published; battery swap is described
chargeTimeMin.condition: battery replacement is not charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 交換方式を充電時間へ流用していない。

batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 公式発表が交換可能バッテリーを記載。化学系・電圧は非公開。

controlMethod.rawValue: force-control architecture designed for safe operation around people; no public operator interface specified
controlMethod.condition: official product architecture, not a named SDK/control API
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 力制御アーキテクチャを操作方式の公式説明として記録するが、遠隔操作APIとは断定しない。

sdk.rawValue: Apollo SDK or public developer package not found on reviewed official pages
sdk.condition: partner/developer extensibility is not a public SDK
sdk.evidenceSummary: 第三者アプリ拡張の位置付けはあるが、公開SDK名・入手方法はない。

computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 計算基盤型番は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: force-control/safe-operation claims found but no Apollo safety standard or certification number
safetyStandard.condition: safety claim is not a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全設計の記載はあるが規格番号はない。

loadRatings.condition: official wording ability to lift 55 pounds; converted to kg; no rated/maximum/scope definition

officialUseCases.officialExpression: delivery of assembly kits / deliver totes of kitted parts
officialUseCases.reason: Mercedes-Benz公式提携発表がApolloの組立キット配送を明示する。
同発表が部品検査を明示する。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: case and tote handling / goods-to-person and person-to-goods warehouse workflows
officialUseCases.reason: 公式物流ソリューションが棚・ラックからの商品ピッキングを明示する。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: manufacturing line-side support, material movement and machine support
officialUseCases.reason: 公式製造業ページの組立・材料搬送・機械供給を接続する。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP apptronik-apollo "retail, home delivery and elder care" https://apptronik.com/news-collection/apptronik-unveils-apollo

usageExamples.title: Apptronik and Mercedes-Benz Enter Commercial Agreement
usageExamples.summary: Mercedes-Benz製造施設でApolloをパイロットし、組立キット・部品トートの配送と部品検査の用途を評価する商用契約。

usageExamples.title: GXO Advances Humanoid Strategy with Apptronik
usageExamples.summary: GXOがApolloの倉庫用途を初期PoCとして評価し、研究室で性能を調整した後に米国配送センターへ展開する多段階R&Dを開始。

marketAvailability.rawValue: official pages document commercial deployment/pilots and production ramp, but no public catalog price or stock
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 商用導入・pilot・量産拡大を確認したが、公開価格はない。

japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本向け販売・在庫は確認できない。

distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Apptronik official Get Started, solutions and press-release contacts are public; Japan support not stated
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式問い合わせ・導入相談導線を確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: Apollo launch source used for official dimensions, runtime and lift wording; launch itself is not counted as a usage example.

conflicts: Apollo original page describes multiple mobility configurations; exact customer configuration is not specified.
Apollo 2 is a separate current platform and its data are not flowed into original Apollo.
humanReviewRequired: Apollo original platformの顧客契約時variant、速度、DoF、電池容量、SDK、計算基盤、IP、温度、安全規格を確認する。
日本での販売・保守・価格条件をApptronikへ確認する。

identity.notes: Apollo 2専用現行公式ページ、2026年Robot Park公式発表、公式Solutionsを確認。Apollo旧世代の数値は流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: next-generation humanoid physical foundation for real-world mobility, manipulation and interaction
bipedal configuration for human spaces and wheeled base for high-throughput environments
Apollo 2 fleets operate at Robot Park and customer/partner sites for real-world data collection and AI training

mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式Apollo 2ページが二足・車輪ベースを直接記載。

heightCm.rawValue: Apollo 2-specific height not published on reviewed current official pages
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 旧Apolloの身長値をApollo 2へ流用していない。

speedMps.condition: mobility modes are described without numeric speed

dof.condition: current official product/Robot Park pages checked

payloadKg.condition: do not flow Apollo original 55lb wording
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 旧Apolloの荷重表現を流用していない。

runtimeMin.rawValue: 7x22 operation is described through swappable batteries, but per-charge runtime is not stated
runtimeMin.condition: continuous operating target is not per-charge runtime
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 7x22運用を稼働時間へ読み替えていない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: charging time not published; opportunity charging/tethering are mentioned
chargeTimeMin.condition: charging options are not charging duration
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電方式の選択肢はあるが時間値はない。

batterySystem.rawValue: swappable batteries; opportunity charging and tethering options
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: Apollo 2公式ページが交換電池、機会充電、テザーを記載。

controlMethod.rawValue: teleoperation and autonomous execution for data collection; Artemis coordinates perception, planning, controls, safety, task execution and HRI
controlMethod.condition: official Robot Park announcement and product page
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 公式発表がテレオペ・自律実行、Apollo 2ページがArtemisの制御・計画を記載。

sdk.rawValue: Artemis and Fleet Connect are platform layers, not a public Apollo 2 SDK; SDK package not found
sdk.condition: do not convert platform product names to SDK
sdk.evidenceSummary: AI/運用プラットフォームは確認できるが、公開SDKは確認できない。

computePlatform.rawValue: compute hardware model not published; Artemis/Gemini are software/AI platform references
computePlatform.condition: do not infer hardware from AI partner/platform

safetyStandard.rawValue: wheeled configuration is described as aligning with existing industrial mobile-robot safety standards, but no standard number/certification is given
safetyStandard.condition: alignment claim is not a named certification
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全標準への適合方針はあるが、規格番号は確認できない。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: logistics data collection and goods-to-person/person-to-goods workflows
officialUseCases.reason: Apollo 2のRobot Parkが物流タスクのデータ収集を明示し、公式ソリューションが棚ピッキングを記載する。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: manufacturing tasks / kitting / machine and tool tending
officialUseCases.reason: 公式Apollo 2ページと製造ソリューションが工場作業を明示する。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: real-world data collection and AI model training with Google DeepMind
officialUseCases.reason: Robot Parkでの研究・学習データ収集を研究開発用途へ接続する。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP apptronik-apollo-2 "retail and future healthcare/home applications" https://apptronik.com/news-collection/welcome-to-robot-park-where-apptroniks-apollo-goes-to-work

usageExamples.title: Welcome to Robot Park: Where Apptronik’s Apollo Goes to Work Training the Next Generation of Humanoid Robot Intelligence
usageExamples.summary: AustinのRobot Parkと顧客・パートナー拠点でApollo 2を運用し、テレオペ・自律実行による物流・製造・小売タスクの実世界データを収集してGemini Robotics学習に利用。

marketAvailability.rawValue: official 2026 announcement says operational Apollo 2 fleets are active at Robot Park, customer and partner sites; no public catalog price
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 顧客・パートナーサイトでの運用を公式発表が記載。

japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本販売・在庫は確認できない。

distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: official Apollo 2 product page, Get Started and press contacts are public; Japan support not stated
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式導入相談・製品文書を確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: Official Apollo 2 announcement documents active Robot Park/customer/partner-site data collection and deployment.

conflicts: Apollo 2 has bipedal and wheeled configurations; no configuration-specific numeric specifications are published on the reviewed pages.
Apollo 2 current platform is distinct from original Apollo; original Apollo numeric values were intentionally excluded.
humanReviewRequired: Apollo 2 configuration-specific height, weight, speed, DoF, payload, runtime, battery capacity, charge time and compute to be confirmed from a customer datasheet.
日本での販売・保守・価格条件をApptronikへ確認する。
